Itâs just his voice. Like, I know it is. But when he talks, something justâ¦ shifts. Itâs not some fancy, deep announcer thing, Or a perfect singer, ready for a swing.

Itâs the way he says my name, a little pause, Like heâs thinking something nice about me, just because. Or when heâs laughing at some stupid joke we shared, And the sound is kind of husky, like he really cared.

Itâs just so easy to listen to, you know? Like when you hear your favourite song on Spotify. Not a big production, nothing you have to strain, Just flowing, like soft, steady summer rain. Speaking of rain, if elaborated, baby your voice sounds like the cold soothing breeze before the clouds shed their tears, like the falling of raindrops on the window with soft thuds that puts all your thoughts into pause. Oh how I absolutely LOVED his voice when he sang for me, made me meltâ¦ the most melodious voice Iâve ever heard. His voice has more harmony than any other instrument Iâve witnessed. 
Sometimes he clears his throat when sending a vm. But itâs comforting, like my favorite hoodie coat. It just smooths out the edges of a really messy day.
.
